revision.text:
<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[ja:豹尾神]][[zh:豹尾神]]
[[File:God of Hyobi.png|thumb|right|170px|Hyobi Shin]] '''Hyobi Shin''' (豹尾神, ひょうびしん) is one of the eight {{ill|Direction Gods|ja|方位神|1=Directional deity|1=Directional deity|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Direction Gods|13=User:Immanuelle/Directional deity|qq=}} ({{ill|Eight Guardian Deities|ja|八将神|1=Eight Directional Deities|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Eight Guardian Deities|13=User:Immanuelle/Eight Directional Deities|qq=}}) in {{ill|Onmyōdō|en|Onmyōdō|qid=Q1340540|lt=Onmyōdō|1=Onmyōdō}}. In some calendars, it is written as "Heubi" (へうび). Its {{ill|Honji suijaku|en|Honji suijaku|qid=Q3080781|lt=Honji|1=Honji suijaku}} is identified as {{ill|Sanbō Kōjin|ja|三宝荒神|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sanbō Kōjin|comment=changed title based on wikidata|1=Sanbo Kojin|qid=Q13577821}}, and Hyobi Shin is accompanied by a {{ill|Goddess|en|Goddess|qid=Q205985|lt=goddess|1=Goddess}} known as {{ill|Tiangong|en|Tiangong|qid=Q7800173|lt=Tenkyū Shin (天宮神)|1=Tiangong}}.
Hyobi Shin is considered the spirit of the {{ill|Ketu (mythology)|en|Ketu (mythology)|qid=Q1367259|lt=Ketō Star|1=Ketu (mythology)}} and is characterized by a volatile temperament. Seeking {{ill|Livestock|en|Livestock|qid=Q103459|lt=livestock|1=Livestock}} in the direction where Hyobi Shin resides is avoided. The deity dislikes uncleanliness; therefore, relieving oneself (urinating or defecating) toward the deity's residing direction is prohibited. Hyobi Shin detests acceptance, while Tenkyū Shin abhors rejection. As such, entering a marital relationship (bringing in a bride or groom) toward the direction of Hyobi Shin or taking a bride or groom from the direction of Tenkyū Shin is considered inauspicious. Violating the directions governed by Hyobi Shin and Tenkyū Shin is said to bring misfortune not only to the family but potentially also to livestock.
== Positions of Hyobi Shin and Tenkyū Shin == * Yearly {{ill|Earthly Branches|en|Earthly Branches|qid=Q1072961|lt=zodiac sign|1=Earthly Branches}} → Corresponding direction ** Hyobi Shin *** Rat (子), Dragon (辰), Monkey (申) → Dog (戌) *** Ox (丑), Snake (巳), Rooster (酉) → Goat (未) *** Tiger (寅), Horse (午), Dog (戌) → Dragon (辰) *** Rabbit (卯), Goat (未), Boar (亥) → Ox (丑) ** Tenkyū Shin *** Rat (子), Dragon (辰), Monkey (申) → Boar (亥) *** Ox (丑), Snake (巳), Rooster (酉) → Monkey (申) *** Tiger (寅), Horse (午), Dog (戌) → Snake (巳) *** Rabbit (卯), Goat (未), Boar (亥) → Tiger (寅)
== See Also == * {{ill|Eight Guardian Deities|ja|八将神|1=Eight Directional Deities|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Eight Guardian Deities|13=User:Immanuelle/Eight Directional Deities|qq=}} * {{ill|Direction Gods|ja|方位神|1=Directional deity|1=Directional deity|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Direction Gods|13=User:Immanuelle/Directional deity|qq=}}
{{Japan-culture-stub}} {{myth-stub}}
